foveal_focus: Tier 15 — The Awareness Stream: Heart-sort applied to life. Priority-sorted, opacity-ranked home screen. No list, no sections, no flood. Position = priority, brightness = urgency.

architectural_locks.color: One white only: #F0EEE9. Hierarchy via opacity.
architectural_locks.layout: Liquid Feed / Zero-Box. Focus outlines globally purged in globals.css.
architectural_locks.infrastructure: Hybrid Stack: Firebase Auth (OTP), Supabase Postgres (decision engine), Firebase Storage (E2EE multimedia), Firebase FCM (push), Gemini 3.1 Ultra (intelligence). Supabase Auth is banned.

xark_intelligence.supabase_client: src/lib/supabase.ts — DB-only, no auth. Env: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. Placeholder fallback for local dev.
xark_intelligence.firebase_client: src/lib/firebase.ts — Phone OTP (auth) + E2EE multimedia (storage). No Firestore. Safe-init: exports null when API key is missing. Prevents SSR crash.
xark_intelligence.grounding_engine: src/lib/ai-grounding.ts — buildGroundingContext(), generateGroundingPrompt(), generateGroundingManifest(), checkSuggestionConflicts(items, category) -> {hasConflict, reason, conflictingItemId}, checkContextConflicts(), getGreeting(context, spaceTitle?) -> deterministic greeting string (3 logic paths: ignited consensus >0.8 / recently locked with owner name / fallback, no AI call). GroundingContext includes topIgnitedTitle, recentlyLocked {title, ownerName}. SpaceItem includes agreementScore.
xark_intelligence.reaction_weights_in_grounding: -3 (Not for me), +1 (Works for me), +5 (Love it). Embedded in all grounding prompts.

grounding_tables.decision_items: id, title, category, description, ownership, space_id, is_locked, agreement_score, weighted_score, locked_at
grounding_tables.messages: id, space_id, role, content, user_id, sender_name, created_at

xark_intelligence.blueprint_view: src/components/os/Blueprint.tsx — Vertical timeline of Green-Lock settled decisions + Settlement Ledger. Fetches locked items from Supabase Postgres ordered by locked_at. 1px timeline line at opacity 0.1. ConsensusMark ignited state. Finality wash via currentColor at opacity 0.05. Framer Motion staggered entrance. Settlement strip at bottom: per-user totals, debt deltas, venmo:// and upi:// deep links as floating cyan text.
xark_intelligence.claims_engine: src/lib/claims.ts — claimItem(itemId, userId, proofValue?) manual Green-Lock. Flow-aware terminal states. Optimistic concurrency. Proof: receipt text or verbal fallback.
xark_intelligence.settlement_ledger: src/lib/ledger.ts — fetchSettlement(spaceId) sums locked item prices per owner. parsePrice() handles $450/nt, $95/person, Free. DebtDelta calculates who owes whom. generateVenmoLink() and generateUPILink() produce payment deep links.
xark_intelligence.space_creation: src/lib/spaces.ts — createSpace(dream, ownerId) optimistic creation engine. Generates slug-based spaceId, inserts space + seed DecisionItem + @xark welcome message in parallel. getOptimisticSpaceId(dream) returns spaceId for immediate navigation before DB confirms. Seed item: 'sunset at [destination]' or 'explore [dream]'. Kills cold-start problem.
xark_intelligence.handshake_protocol: src/lib/handshake.ts — Consensus-to-Commitment bridge. subscribeToConsensus() monitors Supabase Realtime for agreement_score > 0.80. generateHandshakeWhisper() produces @xark lock proposal. confirmHandshake() executes Green-Lock with verbal proof, flow-aware terminal state, optimistic concurrency, owner stamp. unsubscribeFromConsensus() cleanup.
xark_intelligence.handshake_hook: src/hooks/useHandshake.ts — React hook wrapping handshake.ts. Returns { proposal, whisper, confirm, dismiss, isCommitting, goldBurst }. Subscribes to Supabase Realtime on mount. goldBurst fires for 3s after successful lock.
xark_intelligence.chat_handshake_integration: XarkChat uses useHandshake(spaceId). Whisper injected into message stream. confirm (Gold #FFD700 opacity 0.9) and wait (White opacity 0.4) as floating text. Gold breathing dot during commit. Social Gold burst (goldBurstPulse 3s) on success.
xark_intelligence.navigation_flow: Login (/login) -> transit phase 1.2s -> Galaxy (/galaxy?name=) -> tap space -> Space (/space/[id]?name=). Full state chain wired via next/navigation router.push(). Login establishes brand: 'People. Plans. Memories.' (opacity 0.45) + 'All private, effortlessly in sync.' (opacity 0.2).
xark_intelligence.galaxy_view: src/app/galaxy/page.tsx — Awareness Stream home screen. Hero 'ready, [name]?' + awareness feed (priority-sorted events from all spaces, opacity = awarenessOpacity(priority), tap = navigate to space) + Mesh Pulse (15s breath) + creation input at 96px bottom. Imports from awareness.ts. No space list (moved to ControlCaret). No avatars. No sections. Atmospheric text only.
xark_intelligence.space_view: src/app/space/[id]/page.tsx — discuss/decide view toggle as floating text (outline-none). Human-action labels, not system internals. Active: opacity 0.9, inactive: 0.4. Demo fallback for space titles. Renders XarkChat or PossibilityHorizon placeholder. ControlCaret removed (now global via layout).
xark_intelligence.seed_data: src/lib/seed.ts — san diego trip (4 items: Hotel Del 92% locked, surf lessons 45% steady, balboa park 45%, gaslamp 92% locked, 10 group messages), ananya sanctuary (5 messages, last: 'did you see the surf lesson proposal?'), tokyo neon nights (2 items), summer 2026 (empty). Run: npx tsx src/lib/seed.ts.
xark_intelligence.control_caret: src/components/os/ControlCaret.tsx — Fixed cyan dot (#40E0FF) 32px from bottom edge, 4.5s breath. GLOBAL via GlobalCaret.tsx in layout.tsx (hidden on /login). Tap slides up galaxy list with Presence Ember (4px cyan dot when friend online) + 'invite a person' initiation seed (opacity 0.4 whisper). #000 opacity 0.8 overlay (no blur). ConsensusMark per space. Sanctuary spaces get small cyan dot. Supabase Realtime Presence wired.
xark_intelligence.sanctuary_bridge: XarkChat.tsx — Tapping a sender name with a mapped sanctuary opens a slide-up sheet. SANCTUARY_MAP maps names to space IDs. Sheet: #0A0A0A bg, slides from bottom, 80vh max. Foveal opacity on sanctuary messages. Close text at opacity 0.4. No blur, no borders.
xark_intelligence.chat_interface: src/components/os/XarkChat.tsx — Atmospheric, no bubbles, no boxes. MeshGradientBg. Hierarchy via text-2xl scale, never weight. Foveal Opacity: newest message 0.9, recedes to 0.2 at index 5+. Framer Motion layout. Thumb-Arc Action Zone: input 96px from bottom (above ControlCaret zone), floating hints ('suggest a plan', 'add a task' at 0.3), 30vh bottom padding for eye-level centering. Cyan underline only glows on input focus. Sanctuary Greeting: fallback greeting shows even when Supabase unreachable. Infrastructure: Firebase Auth via useAuth hook, Supabase Postgres persistence, Realtime sync.
xark_intelligence.messages_layer: src/lib/messages.ts — fetchMessages(spaceId), saveMessage({id,spaceId,role,content,userId}), subscribeToMessages(spaceId,onMessage), unsubscribeFromMessages(channel). Table: messages (id, space_id, role, content, user_id, created_at). Graceful fallback when Supabase unreachable.
xark_intelligence.auth_hook: src/hooks/useAuth.ts — useAuth(fallbackName?) returns {user: {uid, displayName}, isAuthenticated, isLoading}. Firebase onAuthStateChanged with fallback to URL name param. Firebase-only. No Supabase Auth.

type_system.state_type: open string (not enum) for custom flows
type_system.concurrency: optimistic versioning, VersionConflictError on stale writes
